task_completion.description: The dwanko_run.tnz scene is loaded in OpenToonz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application is open and the title bar, xsheet, or level strip indicates that 'dwanko_run' is loaded. The character animation is visible in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: The background painting is imported into the OpenToonz scene as a separate column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The xsheet or timeline shows a new column containing the background image (night_city). The background image is visible in the main viewer or the level strip shows the loaded image.

task_completion.description: The background column is placed behind the character animation column in the stacking order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the xsheet, the background column has a lower column number than the character column, OR in the viewer, the character is visibly layered on top of the background image. The composite shows character over background, not background occluding the character.

task_completion.description: The background level is exposed across all character animation frames in the Xsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The xsheet shows the background column has cells filled (not empty) for the full range of the character animation frames. Scrolling through the timeline shows the background persists across all frames.

task_completion.description: A Blur effect with value >= 8 is applied to the background column only (not to the character).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FX Schematic shows a Blur effect node connected specifically to the background column's output (not to the character column or the global output). The Blur effect settings panel shows a Value/Radius parameter of 8 or greater. In the viewer, the background appears soft/blurry while the character remains sharp.

task_completion.description: Output settings are configured for 1280x720 PNG to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings window shows resolution set to 1280x720, file format set to PNG, and the Save In path points to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/night_composite/ or a path containing 'night_composite'.

task_completion.description: The composite frames are rendered to the output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A render progress bar/window is visible completing in OpenToonz, OR a file manager/terminal shows multiple PNG files in the output directory, OR the agent verifies successful render completion.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to perform all compositing operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenToonz interface being actively used: FX Schematic with nodes connected, Xsheet columns modified, Output Settings configured through menus -- not terminal commands performing the work.

integrity.description: The Blur effect was applied through OpenToonz FX system, not via terminal image processing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FX Schematic or Xsheet shows a Blur node/effect connected in the pipeline. The agent did not use ImageMagick, FFmpeg, or Python scripts to blur images externally.

integrity.description: The rendered output was generated by OpenToonz's render engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the Render button in OpenToonz and the render progress dialog appears, rather than copying or generating files via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the OpenToonz GUI using terminal commands to composite or process images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows, if visible, do not contain commands like 'convert', 'ffmpeg', 'composite', or python scripts that layer/blur images directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source scene: /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz (72-frame character walk cycle). Background image: /home/ga/OpenToonz/backgrounds/night_city.jpg (a Studio Ghibli production background painting, downloaded from ghibli.jp gallery). Output directory: /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/night_composite/. Expected output: PNG sequence at 1280x720 with character sharp in foreground and background blurred (Blur value >= 8). The background must be in a column behind the character in the Xsheet, and the Blur FX must be connected only to the background column in the FX Schematic.
